name: Chicken and Vegetable Curry
recipeIngredient: 1 large Boiled potato cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken into bite-sized pieces and sauté with onion and curry powder in oil until lightly brown.
2. Add coconut cream, lemon juice, cornflour, stock cubes to the pan. Bring mixture to a boil.
3. Cook gently for 10 minutes.
4. Blanch raw vegetables in boiling water for a few minutes, then drain and add to the curry along with potato, cumin, ginger, and banana.
5. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Serve garnished with coriander. Note: This is not a traditional Fijian-Indian curry as Indians rarely use coconut cream in their curry.
